steps.name: Tumlinson Electric Background
steps.content: {"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"align":"center","id":"pm-lqFbMbq"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Welcome to Tumlinson Electric \ud83d\udc4b"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-741JPp8"}},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-IizDcZm"}},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-8rruAVG"}},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"align":"center","id":"pm-iOI57el"}},{"type":"image","attrs":{"src":"https:\/\/waybook-spaces-production.fra1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com\/uploads\/t_0qd67svcvqonhywlbap1oo2tita9u7cd7t\/20231018_203540_mi_0qdhxtqqjrap7tmrrcd96pqdhsjbflbaz_7woxhaahsvli.png","alt":"","asset":"https:\/\/waybook-spaces-production.fra1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com\/uploads\/t_0qd67svcvqonhywlbap1oo2tita9u7cd7t\/20231018_203540_mi_0qdhxtqqjrap7tmrrcd96pqdhsjbflbaz_7woxhaahsvli.png","title":"","width":"21%","id":"pm-OwDunG2"}},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":1,"align":"center","id":"pm-3GnXd7G"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"EXPERIENCED.\u00a0PROFESSIONAL.\u00a0DEDICATED.","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":[]},{"type":"link","attrs":{"href":"https:\/\/www.tumlinsonelectric.com\/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener noreferrer nofollow"}}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-2wB2KUa"}},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":1,"align":"center","id":"pm-Yj5Hrta"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"HISTORY","marks":[{"type":"bold"},{"type":"font_color","attrs":[]}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-0CE6S2C"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Tumlinson Electric is a full service electrical contracting providing construction services throughout the state of Texas. While it is a fact Tumlinson Electric officially opened its doors in early 2016, it is important to know that it is far from being a new company. Our people is what make Tumlinson Electric the company that it is. The management of Tumlinson Electric bring a vast history of leadership, experience and integrity needed to manage and grow our company and make it successful.","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":[]}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-CUNhPzS"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"\u00a0","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":[]}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-XtPHz9x"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Starting with our overall leadership, Kenneth and Suanna Tumlinson bring nearly 20 years of experience in managing and operating a successful electrical contracting business. \u00a0Together Kenneth and Suanna were managing partners for KST Electric, one of the largest electrical contractors within the state of Texas. During their years of operation at KST, Kenneth oversaw the day-to-day operations of nearly 750 employees and $80 million in annual revenue; while Suanna managed the overall day-to-day financial operations of the company. It was due to their success that allowed them to successfully sell\u00a0KST Electric in 2010. As KST Electric, Kenneth and Suanna successfully saw the completion of thousands of projects within Texas.","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":[]}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-uUTXC8Y"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"\u00a0","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":[]}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-8ZuJeFO"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"In founding Tumlinson Electric, Kenneth and Suanna knew the importance of staffing good people with the experience to manage and operate a successful company. \u00a0It is important that the people of Tumlinson Electric express the values and mission of the company and understand the vision to which Tumlinson Electric wants to grow. Therefore, each member of the Tumlinson Electric project team is an elite performer in their respective positions. They have the expertise and knowledge needed in ensuring that our projects are completed successfully, SAFELY and to our customer\u2019s satisfaction.","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":[]}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-h4VTt7J"}},{"type":"aside","attrs":{"id":"pm-5XMBEdq"},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-flUxRwj"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"\ud83d\udca1 "},{"type":"text","text":"Tumlinson Electric is a state of Texas recognized Woman-Owned Business Enterprise","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":[]}]}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-F4T5nKC"}},{"type":"horizontal_rule"},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":2,"id":"pm-bSlns7b"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"OUR ","marks":[{"type":"bold"},{"type":"font_color","attrs":[]}]},{"type":"text","text":"SERVICES","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":[]}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-yNV0BWn"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Tumlinson Electric provides many in-house services and resources that will provide an incredible value to any project. Our management is actively involved from start to finish, to ensure project goals and needs are being met. Our long-standing commitment to quality, performance and service has given us an excellent reputation among our clients. From the pre-construction phase to owner occupancy and beyond, Tumlinson Electric is committed to devoting the necessary time and resources needed to complete every\u00a0project safely, on schedule, and within budget.","marks":[{"type":"font_color","attrs":[]}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"id":"pm-kRLoVMX"}}]}
